resolved_false_green_risks.control: Authenticated smoke reports require operator session evidence and readiness regression coverage rejects legacy green JSON.
Operator approval readiness validation requires schema_version >= 2 and complete decision inputs.
Monitor-state evidence requires explicit source, state path, generated_at, and fresh per-monitor timestamps.

production_stop_conditions: Do not perform DNS/routing changes until Phase 7 readiness is green.
Do not perform final D1 import without operator approval and source/target evidence.
Do not disable GCP, GKE, Cloud SQL/Postgres, GCS uploads, rollback images, static IP, DNS/LB rollback paths, deployer accounts, or secrets.
Do not mark Phase 8 green until seven elapsed green days have real production evidence.
operator_inputs_required: Final Postgres source counts and post-import D1 target counts
Real logged-in authenticated smoke evidence for all required workflows
Better Stack API evidence or fresh monitor-state export
Schema-v2 operator approval covering maintenance window, rollback, DNS/routing, write freeze, and smoke readiness
Seven days of post-cutover stability evidence
